ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "series_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the series this data point belongs to */,
  "period" REAL /* Time period for this data point (e.g., 2016.06) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "units" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point (e.g., Dollars) */,
  "magnitude" INTEGER /* Magnitude of the data point */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or category of the data (e.g., Business Data Collection - BDC) */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group or sub-category of the data (e.g., Industry by financial variable (NZSIOC Level 2)) */,
  "series_title_1" TEXT /* Title of the series */,
  "series_title_2" TEXT /* Second title of the series */,
  "series_title_3" TEXT /* Third title of the series */,
  "series_title_4" TEXT /* Fourth title of the series */,
  "series_title_5" TEXT /* Fifth title of the series */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_series_title_1 FOREIGN KEY ("series_title_1") REFERENCES series_titles ("series_title_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Business Data Collection - BDC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subject was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Industry by financial variable (NZSIOC Level 2)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_titles" (
  "series_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series title */,
  "series_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the series title (e.g., Sales (operating income)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the series title was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the series title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the datasets table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permission_map" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_map_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
